creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text: I've attached a patch that works and would allow us to update the vuxml entry to make this port no longer vulnerable. However, I'm not comfortable with committing this absent portmgr approval as this is a functionality change of the tiff port and portmgr specifically maintains graphics/tiff due to widespread breakage an update/functionality change can cause. An exp-run to make sure no ports that depend on tiff expect gif2tiff to exist would be wise.
